name: Acme Foundry, Inc.
what_they_make: Gray iron, ductile iron, and aluminum castings for automotive, industrial, and agricultural applications, including complex geometries and tight-tolerance cast components.
who_they_sell_to: OEMs in automotive and heavy equipment industries, tier-1 and tier-2 suppliers, industrial manufacturers requiring cast metal components
key_differentiators: In-house pattern making and tooling capabilities
PPAP and APQP capabilities for automotive compliance
Domestic US manufacturer with shorter lead times vs. overseas foundries
Ability to handle complex casting geometries
common_customer_pain_points: Overseas supplier quality issues and unpredictable lead times
Need for engineering support during design-for-castability phase
Regulatory and compliance traceability requirements
tone: Professional, straightforward, technically credible. No-nonsense audience. Content should be specific and avoid marketing fluff.
notes: New POC is Savannah. Blog, email, LinkedIn. Solid relationship.

name: Advantage Sintered Metals, Inc.
what_they_make: Precision sintered metal components manufactured via powder metallurgy, including gears, bushings, bearings, and structural parts for high-volume applications.
who_they_sell_to: OEMs in automotive, appliance, power tool, and industrial equipment sectors requiring high-volume precision metal parts
key_differentiators: Near-net-shape manufacturing reduces secondary machining costs
High-volume production capability with consistent tolerances
Wide material selection including iron, steel, copper, and brass alloys
Cost-effective alternative to machined or cast components
common_customer_pain_points: High per-part cost from traditional machining on high-volume components
Inconsistent quality from offshore suppliers
Long lead times for tooling and production ramp-up
tone: Technical and educational. Buyers are engineers and procurement professionals who understand manufacturing. Lean into the cost and performance advantages of powder metal vs. alternatives.
notes: Recently started content marketing.

key_differentiators: Full-service fabrication from design to delivery

common_customer_pain_points: Long lead times from larger fabrication shops
